pi_items.metadata_value: Biometric authentication fails after app backgrounding
pi_items.verified_value: Biometric authentication fails after app backgrounding
pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which queries for this exact fragment, and seed_redmine.rb which generates the issue titled 'Biometric authentication fails after app backgrounding on Android 14'.
Confirmed from task.json description which instructs the agent to change the status to 'In Progress'.
Confirmed from task.json description which instructs the agent to add the note 'Starting investigation. Will test on Android 14 emulator and real device.'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on fully synthetic Redmine data generated by seed_redmine.rb. The agent must locate the issue 'Biometric authentication fails after app backgrounding on Android 14', update its status to 'In Progress', and add a note beginning with 'Starting investigation'.
